name: material-fact-lookup
description: Bundled offline material fact lookup tool for expert material knowledge exported from Qdrant.

tools.name: material_facts_lookup
tools.description: Query the offline expert material knowledge export for TDS, SDS, MSDS, material properties, and evidence snippets. Use for exact material-code lookup first, then lexical, semantic, or hybrid evidence retrieval over the configured expert knowledge export.

action.description: Operation to run. Defaults to schema when omitted.

materials.description: Exact material codes to look up or filter by.

query.description: Free-text query for search or profile.

mode.description: Retrieval mode for search or query-backed profile.

limit.description: Maximum number of evidence entries to return.

export_path.description: Explicit path to the offline material expert export JSON.
